Class ExpressionSVWrapper

java.lang.Object
recoder.java.JavaSourceElement
recoder.java.JavaProgramElement
recoder.java.expression.Literal
de.uka.ilkd.key.java.recoderext.ExpressionSVWrapper
All Implemented Interfaces:
KeYRecoderExtension, SVWrapper, Serializable, Cloneable, Expression, LoopInitializer, ProgramElement, ReferencePrefix, SourceElement, Statement, TerminalProgramElement, ModelElement
public class ExpressionSVWrapper extends Literal implements LoopInitializer, KeYRecoderExtension, SVWrapper, ReferencePrefix

    • deepClone

      public ExpressionSVWrapper deepClone()
      Description copied from interface: SourceElement
      Creates a deep clone of the current source element. For NonTerminalProgramElements, the parent roles are valid, except that the root element is not included anywhere and hence has no set parents, of course. This method also clones Comment s, but does not clone derived information such as scopes.
      Specified by:
      deepClone in interface Expression
      Specified by:
      deepClone in interface SourceElement
      Specified by:
      deepClone in interface Statement
